field.label: Listen Interface
field.help: Interface used by the engine capture input. For MVP, choose lo1.

field.label: Max Flows
field.help: Upper limit for concurrently tracked flows.

field.label: Action Mode
field.help: Audit Only records traffic metadata. Enforce enables policy-enforcement mode integration.

field.label: Mirror Interfaces
field.help: Select one or more interfaces to mirror.

field.label: Mirror Direction
field.help: Select ingress, egress, or both directions.

field.label: Max Packets Per Flow
field.help: Selective DPI depth limit per flow.

field.label: ndpiReader Binary Path
field.help: Path to ndpiReader executable. Default: /usr/local/bin/ndpiReader (bundled by this plugin).

field.label: JSON Output Argument
field.help: Argument used to switch engine output to JSON line mode.

field.label: TLS Fingerprint DB
field.help: Path to JA4 or TLS fingerprint database file. Default: /usr/local/share/ndpi/ja4_fingerprints.csv.

field.label: TCP Fingerprint DB
field.help: Path to TCP fingerprint database file. Default: /usr/local/share/ndpi/tcp_fingerprints.csv.

field.label: Protocol Fingerprint DB
field.help: Path to protocol fingerprint database file. Default: /usr/local/share/ndpi/protos.txt.

field.label: Extra Engine Arguments
field.help: Optional extra CLI parameters passed to ndpiReader.
